'''Aubro Ahntanda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] who operated the [[Ahntanda slavery ring|Ahntanda slaving ring]].

==Biography==
Aubro was a slaver who operated on and around the planet [[Kluistar]] and had a business relationship with [[Sibarra]] the Hutt that allowed him to even kidnap people out of the [[Ace of Sabres]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]].

==Personality and traits==
He was cold-blooded, cruel and utterly devoid of morals. He viewed [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] as nothing more than merchandise and was notorious for [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] reluctant slaves.

==Behind the scenes==
Aubro Ahntanda was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].

He was intended to be an antagonist for the player characters as they were investigating missing persons at or around the casino.
